title: joniris ruthenica
intro: Joniris ruthenica, also known as the golden ragwort or St. John's wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Joniris ruthenica include its ability to reduce stress and improve mood, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Joniris ruthenica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
